title: Sieves and Strainers Set - 20 cm Pack of 1 - Metal Sieve Stainless Steel, Fine Mesh Strainer | Kitchen Sieve Fine Mesh, Sive Cooking, Flour for Baking Rust Free Seive, Dishwasher Safe SIV
features: Sturdy Handles: Jojeys sieves and strainers are crafted from top-grade food-safe materials, designed for unmatched strength and long-lasting durability.

Reinforced and Rust-Free: Crafted to the highest safety standards, our fine sieves feature a broad rim for added durability. They resist rust, corrosion, bending, and warping, ensuring long-lasting quality in your kitchen.
Versatile Use: Perfect for straining tea, coffee, juice, and more. Ideal for baking and cooking tasks that require sieving or straining.

Dishwasher-Safe and Easy to Clean: Our rice sieves are designed for easy cleaning and storage. With overhanging hooks for flexible storage, they're dishwasher safe or can be cleaned effortlessly with water.
Responsive Customer Support: Your satisfaction is our priority. We are committed to delivering top-notch products, and if any issues arise, our support team is here to assist promptly.
description: Product Description Different Sizes - Dishwasher Safe - Rust Free Jojeys aims at providing premium quality, go-to kitchen products for you. We understand your needs and ensure the quality that you can rely on. We strive to serve you with the care and utmost delicacy that your kitchen deserves. Jojeys brings premium quality kitchen sieves in 8cm/14cm/20cm sizes. These versatile food-grade flour sieves are designed to sift dry ingredients, pureeing foods or to get those pesky lumps out of your gravy. Each metal sieve features a study mirror-finished broad rim. Not only are these fine mesh sieves rust-proof but they also have securely attached long handles. Our sieves contain a wide resting ear design for extra stability and ease of storage. Jojeys stainless steel sieves are dishwasher safe and are built to last. Small Sieve The small sieve has a size of 8 cm. The small size is ideal for straining tea, coffee, sauces, icing sugar, spices, salt, grains, kombucha and more. Medium Sieve The medium sieve has a size of 14 cm. The medium size great for sifting dry or thick ingredients such as oatmeal, flour, cereal, berries and more. Large Sieve The large sieve has a size of 20 cm. The large size is designed to strain large quantities of items such as quinoa, rice, pasta, noodles, fruits, vegetables and more. Versatile Application Appropriate for Cocktails Fit for Cooking Ideal for Baking Suitable for Hot Oil Premium Stainless Steel - Sturdy Handles - Easy to Clean Make this the last sieve you will ever buy! Theses sieves are made from high-quality, food-grade material which has been designed for long-term use. They are engineered to last with unmatched strength and durability.
